commitVote(bytes32).details: Step 1: Commit Phase. Voter submits their obfuscated vote.

params._commitmentHash: The keccak256 hash of (vote + salt + voter_address)

generateHash(string,string).details: Helper function to let users easily compute their hash in Remix before committing. In a real app, this would be done in javascript on the frontend so the plaintext never touches the blockchain RPC until the reveal phase.

revealVote(string,string).details: Step 2: Reveal Phase. Voter reveals their plaintext vote and salt.

params._salt: The secret random string used during the commit
